A.text: only moves straight up into the sky

B.text: splits and flows over the roof and under the car

C.text: stops and builds up in front of the car

parsed.answer_value: splits and flows over the roof and under the car
parsed.rationale: The visualization shows airflow patterns around the car, with air visibly splitting at the front. The flow continues over the roof and under the car, as indicated by the color gradients and streamline patterns. There is no evidence of air stopping or moving only in one direction. The split flow is consistent with typical aerodynamic behavior around vehicles.
